input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.2.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.2.3
            TITLE: presentation schedule

            CONTENT:
            rule S.2.3: Presentation Schedule
S.2.3 Presentation Schedule 
Teams that fail to make their presentation during their assigned time period will receive zero 
points for the Presentation Event.

final_answer: Teams that fail to make their presentation during their assigned time period will receive zero points for the Presentation Event.
